debug_info.goal:
n k N M : ℕ
h : 0 < n ∧ 0 < k ∧ k ≥ n
inst✝ : NeZero n
heven : Even (k - n)
switch_seq : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → Prop
SN SM : Finset (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool)
h₀ :
  ∀ (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool),
    switch_seq s ↔
      s 0 = Function.const (Fin (2 * n)) false ∧
        ∀ (t : Fin k), ∃ i, s t.succ = Function.update (s t.castSucc) i !s t.castSucc i
h₁ :
  ∀ (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool),
    s ∈ SN ↔
      switch_seq s ∧
        ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico 0 n, s (Fin.last k) ↑i = true ∧ ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico n (2 * n), s (Fin.last k) ↑i = false
h₂ :
  ∀ (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool),
    s ∈ SM ↔
      switch_seq s ∧
        ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico 0 n, s (Fin.last k) ↑i = true ∧ ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico n (2 * n), ∀ (t : Fin (k + 1)), s t ↑i = false
h₃ : N = SN.card ∧ M = SM.card
⊢ ↑N / ↑M = 2 ^ (k - n)

failed_attempts:
show (N / M : ℚ) = 2 ^ (k - n)
  have hn := h.1
  have hk := h.2.2
  -- Step 1: Rewrite N and M as cardinalities
  obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := h₃
  -- Step 2: Show SN.card = (WordN n k).card
  have hSN := card_SN_eq_WordN n k hn switch_seq SN h₀ h₁
  -- Step 3: Show SM.card = (WordM n k).card
  have hSM := card_SM_eq_WordM n k hn switch_seq SM h₀ h₂
  -- Step 4: Show WordN.card = 2^(k-n) * WordM.card
  have hWordN := card_WordN_eq n k hn hk heven
  -- Step 5: Show SM is nonempty (M > 0)
  have hWM := WordM_nonempty n k hn hk heven
  -- Step 6: Combine
  rw [hSN, hSM] at *
  have hM_pos : 0 < (WordM n k).card := Finset.card_pos.mpr hWM
  exact ratio_from_card _ _ _ hM_pos hWordN
